instance.inst-vars: %0 |-> TV ( !hw.inout < i8 > , hw.inout ( "y" , i8 , 0 ) ) %1 |-> TV ( !hw.inout < i8 > , hw.inout ( "z" , i8 , 0 ) ) %arg0 |-> TV ( i8 , 1 )
%0 |-> TV ( !hw.inout < i8 > , hw.inout ( "y" , i8 , 0 ) ) %1 |-> TV ( !hw.inout < i8 > , hw.inout ( "z" , i8 , 0 ) ) %arg0 |-> TV ( i8 , 1 )

circt.result: ListItem ( ListItem ( result ( res , TV ( i8 , 1 ) ) ) ) ListItem ( ListItem ( result ( res , TV ( i8 , 1 ) ) ) )

observation.ob-in: "Top/swap1" |-> ListItem ( 1 ) ListItem ( 3 ) "Top/swap1/wrap" |-> ListItem ( 1 ) "Top/swap2" |-> ListItem ( 1 ) ListItem ( 3 ) "Top/swap2/wrap" |-> ListItem ( 1 )
observation.ob-out: "Top/swap1" |-> ListItem ( result ( res1 , TV ( i8 , 3 ) ) ) ListItem ( result ( res2 , TV ( i8 , 1 ) ) ) "Top/swap1/wrap" |-> ListItem ( result ( res , TV ( i8 , 1 ) ) ) "Top/swap2" |-> ListItem ( result ( res1 , TV ( i8 , 3 ) ) ) ListItem ( result ( res2 , TV ( i8 , 1 ) ) ) "Top/swap2/wrap" |-> ListItem ( result ( res , TV ( i8 , 1 ) ) )
